originalTitle: GoPro’s discounted Max 2 bundle includes $100 worth of accessories
summary: A 360-degree camera is a great way to ensure you capture every bit of the action, but prices tend to be on the high end for models worth your attention. That’s why it’s notable that the GoPro Max 2 accessory bundle is discounted to $369 at Amazon (a dollar more at Best Buy and GoPro). […]
content: A 360-degree camera is a great way to ensure you capture every bit of the action, but prices tend to be on the high end for models worth your attention. That’s why it’s notable that the GoPro Max 2 accessory bundle is discounted to $369 at Amazon (a dollar more at Best Buy and GoPro). The bundle is stuffed for being just $70 more than the base camera, containing everything you need to shoot the best angles during all-day adventures. The capable camera can shoot 360-degree 8K video at 30 frames per second, or 180-degree 4K video at 60FPS, and it can attach to the wide ecosystem of GoPro-compatible mounts. [Product: GoPro Max 2 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FTCK7TNH?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fgopro-max2-action-camera-accessory-bundle-black%2FJ3GW35FPSF] In addition to the Max 2 camera, the bundle includes a four-foot extension pole, two protective lens caps, two high-capacity batteries, a 64GB microSD card, a curved adhesive mount, a mounting buckle for GoPro mounts, a mounting finger adapter for cameras, two thumb screws, a wrist lanyard, a microfiber cloth, and a USB-C cable. The standalone camera includes most of those accessories, but has fewer mounts, a single battery, no SD card, and no extension pole. The pole and extra battery are $75 on their own, so you’re getting a solid deal before you even take the free microSD card into account. The Max 2’s six-mic array records in every direction and automatically reduces wind noise. Alternatively, you can connect Bluetooth microphones, too. The 1.82-inch LCD touchscreen lets you quickly check your footage and manage settings, and it’s waterproof up to 16 feet in case you want to take it swimming or surfing. A single battery should last 66 minutes at full 8K, or 90 minutes at 5.6K resolution. The lenses are replaceable, too, in case a bad fall damages them. [Media: https://www.instagram.com/reel/DQcXV7QER77/?hl=en]
chineseTitle: GoPro 的 Max 2 打折套装包含价值 100 美元的配件
chineseSummary: 360 度相机是确保您捕捉每一个动作的好方法，但对于值得您关注的型号来说，价格往往较高。这就是为什么 GoPro Max 2 配件套装在亚马逊上折扣至 369 美元（在百思买和 GoPro 上要贵一美元）的原因值得注意。 […]
chineseContent: 360 度相机是确保您捕捉每一个动作的好方法，但对于值得您关注的型号来说，价格往往较高。这就是为什么 GoPro Max 2 配件套装在亚马逊上折扣至 369 美元（在百思买和 GoPro 上要贵一美元）的原因值得注意。该套装仅比基础相机贵 70 美元，包含您在全天冒险中拍摄最佳角度所需的一切。这款功能强大的相机可以以每秒 30 帧的速度拍摄 360 度 8K 视频，或以 60 FPS 的速度拍摄 180 度 4K 视频，并且可以连接到兼容 GoPro 的安装座的广泛生态系统。 [产品：GoPro Max 2 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FTCK7TNH?tag=theverge02-20， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fgopro-max2-action-camera-accessory-bundle-black%2FJ3GW35FPSF] 除了 Max 2 相机外，该套装还包括一个四英尺延长杆、两个保护镜头盖、两个高容量电池、一张 64GB microSD 卡、一个弧形粘合支架、一个用于 GoPro 支架的安装扣、一个用于相机的安装手指适配器、两个翼形螺钉、一条腕带、一块超细纤维布和一条 USB-C 电缆。独立相机包含大部分配件，但安装座较少，只有一块电池，没有 SD 卡，也没有延长杆。杆子和额外的电池本身的价格为 75 美元，所以在考虑免费的 microSD 卡之前，你已经得到了实惠的价格。 Max 2 的六麦克风阵列可在各个方向进行录音，并自动降低风噪声。或者，您也可以连接蓝牙麦克风。 1.82 英寸 LCD 触摸屏可让您快速检查镜头并管理设置，防水深度可达 16 英尺，以防您想带着它去游泳或冲浪。一块电池可持续行驶 66 英里
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
